metadata.title: Set Up CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions

story.iWant: automated CI/CD pipeline running tests and builds on every commit
story.soThat: code quality is enforced and broken builds are caught immediately

tasks.task: Configure triggers for push to main and all PRs
Set up Node.js 20.x with npm ci
Add unit/integration test step (npm run test)
Add E2E test step with Playwright browser install
Add dependency caching for faster runs
Write tests for any CI-related utilities if needed

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: GitHub Actions workflow file exists at .github/workflows/ci.yml
Workflow triggers on push to main branch and all pull requests
Steps include: checkout, npm ci, lint, type check, test, e2e, build
Coverage threshold enforced: Build fails if coverage < 100%
Playwright installs browsers in CI environment
Build artifacts cached to speed up subsequent runs
Workflow badge added to README.md showing build status
Coverage report uploaded to artifact storage

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline running linting, type checking, tests, and builds on every commit. 100% coverage threshold enforced.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Vitest for unit/integration, Playwright for E2E. 100% coverage threshold enforced in CI.

file.reason: Coverage thresholds already set to 100% - CI must enforce this
Defines npm scripts: dev, build, test, test:e2e, lint
E2E test configuration - CI needs to run with this config
Test setup file referenced in vite.config.ts

constraints.constraint: 100% coverage threshold must be enforced (build fails otherwise)
Install Playwright browsers with: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
Upload coverage/ directory as GitHub artifact
Cache node_modules using actions/cache with package-lock.json as key

interface.name: npm scripts
interface.signature: npm run lint - ESLint with --max-warnings=0 npm run build - tsc --noEmit && vite build npm run test - vitest --run npm run test:e2e - playwright test

tests.standards: This story primarily creates infrastructure (YAML workflow file) which doesn't have unit tests. However, the CI workflow itself acts as the test - it must successfully run all existing tests. Current test suite: 211 tests passing with Vitest. E2E tests use Playwright with Chromium browser.

ideas.idea: Verify ci.yml file exists and is valid YAML
Manually test by creating a PR or pushing to main
Verify all steps complete successfully in GitHub Actions UI
Verify build fails when coverage is below 100%
Verify badge displays correctly in README
